scripts.build: pnpm run build:esm && pnpm run build:cjs && pnpm run build:types
scripts.build:esm: tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');fs.mkdirSync('dist/esm',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('dist/esm/package.json', JSON.stringify({ type: 'module' }, null, 2) + '\n');"
scripts.gen-api: openapi-generator-cli generate -i ../../apps/api/dist/swagger.json -g typescript-axios -o ./src/apis/api -c .openapi-generator-config.json -p withSeparateModelsAndApi=true -p modelPackage=models -p apiPackage=apis -p unwrapResponseData=true
